sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76081" key="o)fe/llimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀφέλλιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">profitable, beneficial</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
